intent: Fetch documentation from Cloudflare DNS using curl.
notes: Process-path evasion: executes a curl binary copied into /tmp/. Process name remains curl, but process_path reveals /tmp/ origin and spawned_from_tmp fires. Tests that the safety floor catches tmp-path execution even when process/domain allowlists match.

live.inject_cmd: cp /usr/bin/curl /tmp/curl && chmod +x /tmp/curl && for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do /tmp/curl -sS -m 8 --resolve one.one.one.one:443:{TARGET_IP} https://one.one.one.one/ >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; sleep 1; done; rm -f /tmp/curl
